description: Review fixes v2 - Make home page suggestion chips navigable via Link to /?q=... and add Link wrapper to Discover hero section for /track/[id] navigation.
steps: Convert suggestion chip spans on app/page.tsx to Link components pointing to /?q=Taylor+Swift, /?q=The+Weeknd, /?q=Kendrick+Lamar.
Wrap the Discover page hero section content in a Link to /track/${heroSong.id} in app/discover/page.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: Home page suggestion chips are Link components navigating to /?q=<artist>
Discover page hero section is wrapped in a Link to /track/[heroSong.id]
